findings.description: All 7 TDD anchors from task spec covered: testWindowEthereumInjection, testOriginValidation, testRateLimiting, testGasWarning, testGasReject, testEthSignRejection, testWalletAddEthereumChainAllowlist
findings.details: 35 test methods covering all required scenarios plus additional edge cases

findings.description: Tests use real computations (no mock-return pattern), test actual behavior not implementation details
findings.details: Good examples: rate limiter tests verify actual call counting, gas validator tests use boundary values

findings.description: Tests well-organized by category: injection, origin, rate limiting, gas, methods, chains, domains, URLs, parsing, validation, function decoding, approvals
findings.details: Each test is independent and self-documenting with descriptive names

findings.description: org.json:json test dependency added correctly for JVM unit tests (Android provides this at runtime)
findings.details: Avoids RuntimeException from missing Android class in JVM test environment

summary: Excellent test coverage. All 7 TDD anchors present. 35 test methods covering business logic, security validations, edge cases, and error handling. Tests are meaningful and test actual behavior.
